data.title: Justin Sun Sues Bloomberg Over Alleged False Crypto Wealth Report
data.description:
Summary: Why did Justin Sun sue Bloomberg? Justin Sun filed a lawsuit against Bloomberg, claiming the outlet published false and private details about his cryptocurrency holdings in its Billionaires Index. He alleged the report linked him to assets he never owned while omitting ones he does hold. Bloomberg plans to contest the lawsuit, arguing it has First Amendment protections and that Sun cannot show irreparable harm. Justin Sun, founder of the blockchain platform Tron, has filed a lawsuit against major news outlet Bloomberg and requested a temporary restraining order, claiming the outlet published inaccurate and private financial details in its The post Justin Sun Sues Bloomberg Over Alleged False Crypto Wealth Report first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/15/justin-sun-sues-bloomberg-over-alleged-false-crypto-wealth-report/

data.title: US Treasury Cracks Down on Garantex: Implications for SHIB Holders
data.description:
Summary: Why did the U. S. Treasury sanction Garantex and Grinex? The Treasury targeted Garantex and its successor Grinex for facilitating crypto transactions tied to ransomware groups and other cybercriminal activity. The exchanges allegedly moved wallets to avoid detection and provided false account information
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/15/us-treasury-cracks-down-on-garantex-implications-for-shib-holders/

data.title: Wallet Linked to LonglingCapital Sells 7,000 ETH Amid Market Decline
data.description: According to PANews, a wallet associated with LonglingCapital, identified by the address 0x3478, sold 7,000 ETH during a market downturn, cashing out approximately $31.82 million. Despite the sale, the wallet still holds 79,077 ETH, valued at around $352 million.

data.title: SEC launches “Project Crypto” to modernize U.S. digital asset regulations
data.description:
15-8-2025 – SEC Chairman Paul Atkins unveiled Project Crypto, a bold initiative to modernize U. S. securities regulations and establish the nation as the global leader in digital finance. The plan aims to foster innovation by creating clear rules for crypto asset distribution, custody, and trading
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/sec-launches-project-crypto-to-modernize-u-s-digital-asset-regulations/

data.title: $1.6M Vanishes in a Week as Crypto Address Poisoning Scams Surge
data.description:
Between Aug. 9 and 15, 2025, crypto address poisoning scams stole over $1. 6 million from users, highlighting the growing risk of low-tech but highly effective attacks.

The post $1. 6M Vanishes in a Week as Crypto Address Poisoning Scams Surge first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/08/15/crypto-address-poisoning-drain-1-6m/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=crypto-address-poisoning-drain-1-6m
